comments.author: @ChanelNatureTravel4K
comments.text: Before watching this documentary, I knew very little about Pantanal. It's surprising that a landscape of this scale and importance receives so little attention compared to many other famous natural regions. After seeing how water shapes the entire ecosystem, it's easy to understand why Pantanal is considered one of the most extraordinary places in South America.
